note: Do not instantiate directly; use itasca.block.subcontact module functions.

method_groups.disp: disp_norm, disp_shear, disp_shear_x, disp_shear_y, disp_shear_z, set_disp_norm
method_groups.force: force_norm, force_pp, force_shear, force_shear_x, force_shear_y, force_shear_z, set_force_norm

methods.name: apini
methods.description: Get the initial mechanical aperture.

methods.name: area
methods.description: Get the subcontact area.

methods.name: b1
methods.description: Get block 1 of the subcontact.

methods.name: b2
methods.description: Get block 2 of the subcontact.

methods.name: contact
methods.description: Get the contact index to which this subcontact belongs.

methods.name: disp_norm
methods.description: Get the normal displacement of a subcontact.

methods.name: disp_shear
methods.description: Get the subcontact contact shear displacement vector (vector).

methods.name: disp_shear_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the subcontact contact shear displacement vector.

methods.name: disp_shear_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the subcontact contact shear displacement vector.

methods.name: disp_shear_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the subcontact contact shear displacement vector.

methods.name: extra
methods.description: Get the subcontact extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: face
methods.description: Get the face of a vertex-face subcontact.

methods.name: fid
methods.description: Get the DFN fracture ID number at a subcontact.

methods.name: force_norm
methods.description: Get the normal force at a subcontact.

methods.name: force_pp
methods.description: Get the subcontact pore pressure force.

methods.name: force_shear
methods.description: Get the subcontact contact shear force vector (vector).

methods.name: force_shear_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the subcontact contact shear force vector.

methods.name: force_shear_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the subcontact contact shear force vector.

methods.name: force_shear_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the subcontact contact shear force vector.

methods.name: fpZone
methods.description: Get the flow zone associated with the subcontact.

methods.name: gp
methods.description: Get the vertex for a vertex-face subcontact.

methods.name: group
methods.description: Get the subcontact group name in a given slot.

methods.name: group_remove
methods.signature: subcontact.group_remove(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> bool
methods.description: Remove from the given group from all group slots of the subcontact. One argument of type string, giving the group name, is required. The return value is a bool which is True if the group was removed from any slot, otherwise False.

methods.name: groups
methods.description: Get a dictionary describing which groups this subcontact is part of. The keys of the dictionary are the slot names and the values are the group names.

methods.name: id
methods.description: Get the subcontact id.

methods.name: in_group
methods.signature: subcontact.in_group(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> bool
methods.description: Test if the subcontact is part of a given group. If the optional argument slot is given, only that slot is searched. Otherwise, all group slots are searched.

methods.name: index
methods.description: Get the index (offset) for the subcontact.

methods.name: is_excavated
methods.description: Get the excavation status of the subcontact.

methods.name: is_hidden
methods.description: Get the hidden indicator for the subcontact.

methods.name: model
methods.description: Get the assign joint constitutive model at a subcontact.

methods.name: pos
methods.description: Get the subcontact subcontact position (vector).

methods.name: pos_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the subcontact subcontact position.

methods.name: pos_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the subcontact subcontact position.

methods.name: pos_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the subcontact subcontact position.

methods.name: pp
methods.description: Get the subcontact pore pressure force.

methods.name: prop
methods.description: Get the assigned property values of subcontact models.

methods.name: set_disp_norm
methods.description: Set the normal displacement of a subcontact.

methods.name: set_extra
methods.description: Set the subcontact extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: set_force_norm
methods.description: Set the normal force at a subcontact.

methods.name: set_group
methods.signature: subcontact.set_group(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> None
methods.description: Set the subcontact group name in a given slot.

methods.name: set_model
methods.description: Set the assign joint constitutive model at a subcontact.

methods.name: set_pp
methods.description: Set the subcontact pore pressure force.

methods.name: set_prop
methods.description: Set the assigned property values of subcontact models.

methods.name: set_shear_max
methods.description: Set the maximum shear displacement magnitude at any point in the past.

methods.name: set_state
methods.description: Set the subcontact state indicator.

methods.name: shear_max
methods.description: Get the maximum shear displacement magnitude at any point in the past.

methods.name: sratio
methods.description: Get the ratio of shear force magnitude to normal force.

methods.name: state
methods.description: Get the subcontact state indicator.

methods.name: stress_norm
methods.description: Get the normal stress at the subcontact.

methods.name: stress_shear
methods.description: Get the shear stress magnitude.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Get the subcontact type.

methods.name: valid
methods.description: Returns True if this subcontact is live.

methods.name: vel_shear
methods.description: Get the subcontact contact shear velocity vector (vector).

methods.name: vel_shear_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the subcontact contact shear velocity vector.

methods.name: vel_shear_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the subcontact contact shear velocity vector.

methods.name: vel_shear_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the subcontact contact shear velocity vector.
